headline: The Kraft Heinz Company to Report Second Quarter 2026 Results on August 5, 2026
summary: PITTSBURGH & CHICAGO, July 13, 2026--The Kraft Heinz Company (Nasdaq: KHC) ("Kraft Heinz") will release its second quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, August 5, 2026. A press release and supplemental materials, including a pre-recorded management discussion, will be issued before the market opens. Kraft Heinz management will then host a live question-and-answer session with analysts beginning at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time.
